title: Ubiquiti UniFi AP U7 Pro XGS, black
description: Ubiquiti U7 Pro XGS-B is a new WiFi 7 UniFi access point in black colour. It is a tri-band AP offering transfer speeds of up to 5.8 Gbps in the 6 GHz band, up to 8.6 Gbps in the 5 GHz band, and up to 688 Mbps in the 2.4 GHz band, with advanced WPA3 encryption . The U7-Pro-XGS is designed to provide wireless coverage for your home, office, hotel space, or warehouse and supports up to 500+ connected clients. Full roaming support ensures smooth handover of connected clients between access points.… Roaming â seamless transition between APs without disconnects Wireless uplink â ideal for locations where cabling is not possible Up to 8 SSIDs Detailed traffic statistics Guest network Load balancing â maintain even load / switch clients between APs Speed limiting per SSID Device Ceiling mount kit Screw set
